_comment: GERG-2008 binary parameters from Tables A6, A8, and A3.7 of Kunz & Wagner (2012). Each pair has reducing-function parameters (beta_T, gamma_T, beta_v, gamma_v) and a departure-function scaling factor F. Pairs with non-zero F also have a 'departure' block containing polynomial and/or exponential terms. The 8 alkane pairs share the same 10-term generalized polynomial; the other 7 pairs have binary-specific terms.
